narrative:
Beavercreek 039 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,722 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
